tool_definitions.name: get_status
tool_definitions.description: Check WhatsApp bridge connection status. Returns connected state, phone number, QR code if pending.

tool_definitions.name: send_message
tool_definitions.description: Send a text message via WhatsApp.

to.description: Phone number E.164 (e.g. +33612345678) or group JID

tool_definitions.name: send_image
tool_definitions.description: Send an image via WhatsApp from a local file path.

image_path.description: Absolute path to image (jpg, png, gif, webp)

tool_definitions.name: send_video
tool_definitions.description: Send a video via WhatsApp from a local file path.

tool_definitions.name: send_audio
tool_definitions.description: Send a voice message (PTT) via WhatsApp. Must be OGG/Opus.

tool_definitions.name: send_file
tool_definitions.description: Send a document/file via WhatsApp (PDF, ZIP, TXT, etc.).

tool_definitions.name: send_location
tool_definitions.description: Send a location pin via WhatsApp.

tool_definitions.name: send_contact
tool_definitions.description: Send a contact card (vCard) via WhatsApp.

tool_definitions.name: react_to_message
tool_definitions.description: React to a message with an emoji (like, heart, etc.). Use empty emoji to remove reaction.

jid.description: Chat JID where the message is

message_id.description: ID of the message to react to

emoji.description: Emoji reaction (e.g. '👍', '❤️', '😂'). Empty string to remove.

tool_definitions.name: edit_message
tool_definitions.description: Edit a previously sent message (only own messages, within 15 min).

message_id.description: ID of the message to edit

tool_definitions.name: delete_message
tool_definitions.description: Delete a message for everyone in the chat (only own messages, within ~2 days).

message_id.description: ID of the message to delete

tool_definitions.name: pin_message
tool_definitions.description: Pin or unpin a message in a chat.

pin.description: true to pin, false to unpin

tool_definitions.name: pin_chat
tool_definitions.description: Pin or unpin a conversation to the top of the chat list.

pin.description: true to pin, false to unpin

tool_definitions.name: archive_chat
tool_definitions.description: Archive or unarchive a conversation.

archive.description: true to archive, false to unarchive

tool_definitions.name: mute_chat
tool_definitions.description: Mute or unmute a conversation.

mute.description: true to mute, false to unmute

tool_definitions.name: mark_read
tool_definitions.description: Mark a conversation as read or unread.

tool_definitions.name: delete_chat
tool_definitions.description: Delete an entire conversation (irreversible).

tool_definitions.name: create_group
tool_definitions.description: Create a new WhatsApp group with specified participants.

participants.description: Array of phone numbers E.164 to add as members

tool_definitions.name: group_info
tool_definitions.description: Get full information about a WhatsApp group: name, description, members, admins, settings.

tool_definitions.name: group_update
tool_definitions.description: Update group settings: name, description, or admin-only mode.

tool_definitions.name: group_manage_members
tool_definitions.description: Add, remove, promote to admin, or demote members in a group.

participants.description: Phone numbers E.164 of members to manage

tool_definitions.name: check_whatsapp
tool_definitions.description: Check if phone numbers have WhatsApp accounts.

phones.description: Array of phone numbers E.164 to check

tool_definitions.name: get_profile_info
tool_definitions.description: Get profile picture URL, status text, and business info for a contact.

tool_definitions.name: list_recent_media
tool_definitions.description: List recently received WhatsApp media files (images, audio, video, documents).
